UD JURY TRIALS

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-25-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Line 13
Judge Pro Tem Elan Lambert: , Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Bill Quan is present.
Attorney Liana Ayrapetyan for the plaintiff.
Defendant Michael Barron is present.
Attorney Brian Brophy appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of DEC-01-2014 is vacated. (501/JPT)
